title: CaseHistoryEventResponse
description: Schema for CaseHistoryEventResponse in Nuix REST API

cancelled.description: Tests if the action was cancelled.

details.description: Gets the details of the event.

startDate.description: Gets the start date (and time.) represented in milliseconds since the epoch.

endDate.description: Gets the end date (and time.) represented in milliseconds since the epoch.

unknown.description: Tests if the action was unknown.

type.description: Gets the type string for this event.

username.description: Gets the user who performed the action.
